title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: How has online shopping affected local communities?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two effects of online shopping have been the most damaging to local communities.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about how online shopping has affected local communities.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two effects have been the most significant.
